CustomField.description: How this appointment was booked, matching design §2.3 exactly: Portal (citizen Experience Cloud site, VS-16), Chat (future chat-assistant seam, Annexure C9 -- not built in F-001), Staff (facility staff booking on a citizen's behalf), WalkIn (booked at the facility on the day, draws from the session's walk-in reserve, D-006/D-009). Set by VS_BookingService.book(patientId, slotId, bookedById, channel) (VS-09) from its channel argument -- no default value, no automation in this ticket.
CustomField.label: Booked Channel
